queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account influences credit default probability and functions as a protective determinant in consumer loan risk assessment.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings at least 1000 DM.
queries.question: Statistical evaluation of the relationship between maintaining savings balances of at least 1000 DM and the empirical reduction of credit risk in borrower default modeling.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default probability associated with minimal savings balances below 100 DM and their documented impact on mitigating credit risk exposure in lending portfolios.
